description_long: This is a vintage, single-propeller biplane with a beige fuselage and teal wings, reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The wings are straight and feature a slight dihedral angle, with the upper and lower wings connected by struts. The tail section is white with a black cross insignia, and the vertical stabilizer is prominent. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the engine, with visible instrumentation and a single seat. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a tail skid, all fixed and exposed, and the engine is a visible inline piston type mounted at the nose.
description: A vintage beige and teal biplane with an open cockpit, visible nose-mounted piston engine, and fixed landing gear. The tail features a black cross insignia and the wings are straight with a slight dihedral.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single propeller, open cockpit, and the full span of the teal wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the exposed inline engine, cockpit placement, and the black cross insignia on the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, dihedral wings, and the tapering fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the engine, cockpit, and tail markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with straight, mid-mounted wings featuring a slight dihedral angle and no winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted inline piston engine with exposed cylinders.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers; features a black cross insignia.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the engine with visible instrumentation.
